companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Lyrics Enhancement

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: Lyrics enhancement adoption from Kima Hub v1.6.0 (KH-13, KH-25)
- Scope: Implementation
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation state: Backlog candidate (not started)

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0 changelog analysis.

## Goal

Harden LRCLIB lyrics integration and add visual lyrics display to the player (3-line crawl in mini player, full scrollable panel in overlay player).

## Spec Outline

### KH-13: LRCLIB Lyrics Integration Enhancement
- **Priority**: Medium | **Effort**: 2-3 hours
- Verify existing LRCLIB integration quality (backend lyrics service path needs verification).
- Ensure rate limiting is in place for LRCLIB.net API calls.
- LRC parser must handle edge cases:
  - Centisecond timestamps: `[MM:SS.xx]`
  - Millisecond timestamps: `[MM:SS.xxx]`
  - Metadata line filtering: `[ar:Artist]`, `[ti:Title]`
- Files: Backend lyrics service, `frontend/hooks/useLyrics.ts`

### KH-25: Lyrics Crawl Display Component
- **Priority**: Medium | **Effort**: 1-2 hours
- 3-line lyrics crawl (previous/current/next lines) with CSS fade/scale transitions for mini player.
- Full scrollable lyrics panel with auto-scroll and tap-to-seek for overlay player.
- Conditional rendering when synced lyrics are available; graceful fallback otherwise.
- New file: `frontend/components/player/LyricsCrawl.tsx`
- Integration: `MiniPlayer.tsx`, `OverlayPlayer.tsx`

## Refined Spec

### Constraints
1. No TrackLyrics Prisma schema changes.
2. Existing lyrics fetch/cache behavior preserved.
3. New UI components follow existing player component patterns.

### Acceptance Criteria
1. LRCLIB integration has proper rate limiting.
2. LRC parser handles all timestamp formats and filters metadata lines.
3. Mini player shows 3-line lyrics crawl when synced lyrics available.
4. Overlay player has scrollable lyrics panel with tap-to-seek.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Task 1: KH-13 — LRCLIB Integration Hardening
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: Verified rate limiting, fixed LRC parser edge cases, test suite

### Task 2: KH-25 — Lyrics Crawl Display Component
- Status: Pending
- Deliverable: LyricsCrawl.tsx, MiniPlayer integration, OverlayPlayer scrollable panel

plan.title: Kima Hub Upstream — Lyrics Enhancement
plan.objective: Adopt two lyrics items from Kima Hub v1.6.0 (KH-13, KH-25): verify and harden LRCLIB integration quality (rate limiting, LRC parser edge cases), and add a lyrics crawl display component to the player.
in_scope: Verify and harden LRCLIB lyrics integration
Robust LRCLIB integration with rate limiting and correct LRC parsing
Add lyrics crawl display component to player surfaces
3-line lyrics crawl in mini player and full scrollable panel in overlay player
out_of_scope: No new lyrics data sources beyond LRCLIB. No lyrics editing or user-contributed lyrics. No karaoke-style word-level sync. No changes to the TrackLyrics Prisma model schema.

tasks.summary: KH-13: Verify LRCLIB integration, add rate limiting, and fix LRC parser edge cases for centisecond/millisecond timestamps and metadata filtering
KH-25: Create LyricsCrawl component with 3-line display for mini player and full scrollable panel for overlay player
acceptance_criteria: Graceful fallback for no synced lyrics

tasks.summary: Run verification for resumed soundspan work
acceptance_criteria: Run the repo-defined ACM verification tests before completion.

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Adopt two lyrics items from Kima Hub v1.6.0 (KH-13, KH-25): verify and harden LRCLIB integration quality (rate limiting, LRC parser edge cases), and add a lyrics crawl display component to the player.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No new lyrics data sources beyond LRCLIB. No lyrics editing or user-contributed lyrics. No karaoke-style word-level sync. No changes to the TrackLyrics Prisma model schema.

spec_outline.summary: Two complementary lyrics improvements: backend LRCLIB integration hardening with proper rate limiting and LRC parser edge case handling, and a frontend 3-line lyrics crawl display component for the mini player plus full scrollable panel for the overlay player.

full_spec_outline.objective: Verify and harden LRCLIB lyrics integration
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Robust LRCLIB integration with rate limiting and correct LRC parsing
acceptance_criteria: LRCLIB rate limiting implemented or verified
LRC parser handles centisecond ([MM:SS.xx]) and millisecond ([MM:SS.xxx]) timestamps
Edge cases tested and regression suite added

full_spec_outline.objective: Add lyrics crawl display component to player surfaces
full_spec_outline.deliverable: 3-line lyrics crawl in mini player and full scrollable panel in overlay player
acceptance_criteria: LyricsCrawl component shows previous/current/next lines with CSS fade/scale transitions
MiniPlayer conditionally renders LyricsCrawl when synced lyrics available
OverlayPlayer has full scrollable lyrics panel with auto-scroll and tap-to-seek
Graceful fallback when no synced lyrics available

refined_spec.summary: KH-13 is a backend audit/hardening task — verify existing LRCLIB integration, add rate limiting if missing, and fix LRC parser edge cases. KH-25 is a frontend-only component. Both depend on the existing TrackLyrics Prisma model and useLyrics hook.

full_refined_spec.decision: Build on existing lyrics infrastructure without schema changes; add display components and harden parsing
full_refined_spec.rationale: Soundspan already has TrackLyrics in Prisma and useLyrics.ts — this is enhancement, not greenfield.
acceptance_criteria: New UI components follow existing player component patterns

implementation_plan.summary: Two steps: backend LRCLIB hardening first, then frontend display component. KH-25 depends on KH-13 for correct synced lyrics data.

steps.deliverable: KH-13: Verify LRCLIB integration, add rate limiting, and fix LRC parser edge cases for centisecond/millisecond timestamps and metadata filtering
KH-25: Create LyricsCrawl component with 3-line display for mini player and full scrollable panel for overlay player
acceptance_criteria: Graceful fallback for no synced lyrics
